questions.prompt: Look up any tx by id?

choices.text: Requires txindex=1 in bitcoin.conf. Adds ~10 GB index. Without it, only wallet txs queryable. Required for block explorers, payment processors, custom apps.

questions.explanation: txindex=1 for tx lookups outside wallet.

choices.text: Bitcoin Core doesn't index addresses. Run electrs / esplora / Fulcrum indexer alongside bitcoind. Uses Electrum protocol on port 50001. Powers wallets (Electrum, Sparrow) + explorers.
